description: Lists the image IDs inside Schuylkill County, Pennsylvania probate image group 007936749 — the unindexed volume (recordSearchablePercent 0, fulltextSearchable false, imageCount 412) returned by volume-search-schuylkill. Drives the browse-an-unindexed-volume path: image_search returns the sorted image IDs and the skill pages through them with image_read.
